title: Chinna Sirusugal Lyrics Kunguma Poovum Konjum Puravum
stanzas:
putham pudhusaaga
nenappugal posu posunu
pattu pookkal pookka

podhuvaakka paruvam oru
poondhottam aachu
nee.. pazhakam oru
neerottam aachu
vilagaadha uravu oru
kondaattam aachu

putham pudhusaaga
nenappugal posu posunu
pattu pookkal pookka

Chinna sirusugal
manasukkul silu silunu
chinna thooral poda

sidu moonji neethaan endru
solli solli
killi killu
chinna chinna saettai
seidhenaa..ohh ho..

sandhu pondhil
neethaan vandhaa
othipoga oththukkaama
sandiyar pol vambu
seidhen naan. oh ho..

ara drawer potta
paiyyan padaadha dhawani
viral sooppi ninna
pulla nee pottaachu
dhawani

vilayaattaa irundha mugam
yaen velirii pochu
verenna poopu adanja
veveram therinjaachu

kurumbattam thirinja ponnu
yaen kumari aachu.
verenna udambu unakku
valangu mudivaachu..

mannaalathaan veedu katti
naanum neeyum vaazhurappo
meen kuzhambu aakki potta nee

kamarukatti kadala muttai
vaai vachi kaakkaa kadi
kadichi thandhaai nee

karuvaatta pola
theeyila en nenja
vaatina
angaala amman koyilil
kanjaada nee kaattina

adi aathi manasukula
poo vachi paarthu
veraaga aadi aasaiyum
azhagu mani theru

adi aathi nenapukull
poi ninnathaaru
veraaru poocham vidutha
neecham maram poovu..

Chinna sirusugal
manasukkul silu silunu
chinna thooral poda

putham pudhusaaga
nenappugal posu posunu
pattu pookkal pookka

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Chinna Sirusugal?

The song Chinna Sirusugal expresses the small joys and sweet moments of love, capturing the essence of romantic feelings.

What is the plot context of the movie Kunguma Poovum Konjum Puravum?

The movie Kunguma Poovum Konjum Puravum revolves around love and relationships, showcasing the journey of its characters through various emotional landscapes.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Bella Shinde and Javed Ali.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Chinna Sirusugal was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique style and melodies.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 24, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chinna Sirusugal, the characters experience the tender moments of love, reflecting the joy and warmth that comes with it. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and happiness, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As the singers convey their emotions, listeners are transported into a world of sweet memories and affectionate connections. This track beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it a memorable piece in the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chinna Sirusugal from the film Kunguma Poovum Konjum Puravum is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Bella Shinde and Javed Ali, and Yuvan's melodious composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of affection. Dive into the soothing vibes of this track that perfectly complements the film's romantic narrative.
stanzaMeanings: Little joys sprinkle in the heart like tiny droplets.
New and fresh feelings bloom like flowers in the mind.
Generally, a season of flowers has come; a bond that cannot be separated has formed.
New and fresh feelings bloom like flowers in the mind.
Little joys sprinkle in the heart like tiny droplets.
You are the one who said it, saying it again and again, if I make small mistakes... ohh ho..
In the gathering, you came and I got caught, without escaping, I acted like a fool. oh ho..
The boy who put his hand in the drawer, you made a sound that shouldn't be made.
Why does your face look different when playing? I realized that a flower has bloomed in a different way.
The girl who has changed her appearance, why has she become a maiden? Your body has become a burden for you..
When we build a house together, you made fish curry for us.
You took the coconut and broke it open, you gave me a piece of it.
Like a black pot in the fire, my heart burns; you showed me the temple of the goddess there.
That is the first flower in the heart, looking at it, a different desire and beautiful bell street.
That is the first thought, if you go away, it will be like a flower that has fallen from the tree..
Little joys sprinkle in the heart like tiny droplets.
New and fresh feelings bloom like flowers in the mind.
